question: Will the total dollar amount of reserve balances held with Federal Reverse Banks have increased by 2026-04-05 as compared to its value on 2026-03-29?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/WRBWFRBL once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-03-29 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-03-19) was 3073151.000. (The latest value released in Liabilities and Capital: Other Factors Draining Reserve Balances: Reserve Balances with Federal Reserve Banks: Wednesday Level from the release H.4.1 Factors Affecting Reserve Balances.)
